## Full Diagnosis

### The core bug: `congress_report` always posts to a thread URL even when `thread_id` is `None`

In `congress_report` (line 1405):
```python
thread_url = f"https://discord.com/api/v10/channels/{thread_id}/messages"
```

When `thread_id` is `None`, this becomes `https://discord.com/api/v10/channels/None/messages` — which Discord will reject with an error, causing `congress_report` to raise and the final report never posts properly.
